creator: freebsd@q7r7.com
text:
I also have this Keychron Q3 keyboard and the same problem. It works by default on OpenBSD, NetBSD, and every distribution of Linux, but not FreeBSD (as of 14.0 / May 2024).

Thanks to David Pedersen for the patch from 2022.  I hope someone can apply his patch to the release.
